info.name: OCR + OpenAI IMEI Extraction API
info.description: API for extracting IMEI numbers from images using Tesseract OCR and OpenAI

formdata.description: Image file containing IMEI text (JPEG, PNG, WebP, AVIF)

request.description:
Upload an image and extract IMEI numbers from it

**Request:**
- Method: POST
- Body: form-data with 'image' file field

**Response:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "IMEI extraction completed successfully",
  "data": {
    "rawText": "Extracted text from image...",
    "imeiNumbers": ["123456789012345", "987654321098765"],
    "confidence": "high",
    "processingTime": 2500
  }
}
```
